overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its first meeting after reorganization, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission learned that a competing hot air balloon event in Marshfield was cancelled, potentially boosting attendance at the Weston event.
presiding: Trustee Erling, Chair (elected at this meeting)

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
Work product transmittals, educational presentations, reports
New business - Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: Trustee Erling was nominated for chair and approved unanimously. Cushing was nominated for vice chair by a commissioner, seconded by Jackson, and approved unanimously. Renee was nominated and approved unanimously as secretary.
Minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved. Motion was seconded by Renee and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Grant Request - Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill from Taste and Glow Balloonfest (3308 Green Pastures Lane) presented their grant request. He reported 11,000-12,000 estimated attendees last year and announced that a competing Marshfield hot air balloon event was cancelled due to permit issues, making Taste and Glow the sole hot air balloon event in the area. Commissioner Hodal asked about room tracking, noting the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year when they received $5,000. The commission requested better tracking of hotel room usage for future applications. Motion to approve $5,000 grant was made and seconded by Jackson, passing unanimously.

Renee reported on attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar. She described meeting the candidates, including winner Anastasia, and noted the contestants toured Marathon County locations including Mullen's Cheese. This was the first time Marathon County hosted the event since the 1970s. The candidates expressed appreciation for the community.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Taste and Glow Balloonfest to provide hotel room usage data in their post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM
title: Tourism Commission
